basic_details.job_title: Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Teaching Faculty and Medical Officers Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya has officially announced the Teaching Faculty and Medical Officers Recruitment 2026 with 19 openings. The detailed notification has been released on the official website. Candidates meeting the age criteria for respective posts Medical Officer: 32 years, Assistant Professor: 50 years, Associate Professor: 55 years, Professor: 66 years and holding relevant qualifications such as MBBS, MD/MS, M.Ch, DM, DNB, M.Phil, PhD, or equivalent recognized degrees can apply. Eligible candidates can submit their applications offline on or before 27 June 2026. The official no

age_limit.age_details: Varies by post. Medical Officer: 32 years. Assistant Professor: 50 years. Professor: 66 years. Associate Professor: 55 years.
age_limit.details: Professor (Paediatrics): Maximum Age: 66 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) as per Govt. of India's rules. Associate Professor (Paediatrics): Maximum Age: 55 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) as per Govt. of India's rules. Assistant Professor (Anesthesiology, Dermatology, ENT, Orthopaedics, Paediatrics, Radiology): Maximum Age: 50 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) as per Govt. of India's rules. Assistant Professor (Ped Surgery): Maximum Age: 50 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) as per Govt. of India's rules. Medical Officer: Maximum Age: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) as per Govt. of India's rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS, M.Ch, DM, DNB, M.Phil, PhD, or equivalent recognized degrees as per post. Specific qualifications and experience vary by post.
qualification.details: Professor (Paediatrics): Medical Qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Postgraduate qualification i.e. MD (Paediatrics) or equivalent recognized degree. Fourteen (14) years of teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution in the subject or specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Associate Professor (Paediatrics): Medical Qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Postgraduate qualification i.e. MD (Paediatrics) or equivalent recognized degree. Six (06) years of teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution in the subject or specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Assistant Professor (Anesthesiology, Dermatology, ENT, Orthopaedics, Paediatrics, Radiology): Medical Qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Postgraduate qualification i.e. MD/MS (in concerned specialty) or equivalent recognized degree. Three (03) years of teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Assistant Professor (Ped Surgery): Medical Qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. M.Ch. In Pediatric Surgery (2 years or 3 years or 5 years or 6 years recognized course after MBBS) or recognized qualification equivalent thereto. One year teaching and/or research experience in a recognized Institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the Degree of M.Ch. In Pediatric Surgery (2 years or 5 years recognized course after MBBS) or a qualification recognized equivalent thereto. However, no experience is necessary for the candidates possessing three years or six years recognized Degree of M.Ch. In Pediatric Surgery. Medical Officer: A recognized MBBS qualification included in the First or Second Schedule or Part-Il of the Third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical act, 1956. Completion of compulsory rotating internship - Candidates who may not have completed rotating internship shall be eligible to appear for the written examination provided that, If selected, they shall have satisfactorily completed the compulsory internship before appointment.

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Rs. 3,05,000/-; Associate Professor: Rs. 2,55,000/-; Assistant Professor: Rs. 1,95,000/-. Medical Officers: Rs. 15600-39100+5400 (GP) (Pre-revised) and Rs. 56100/-, Level 10 and Cell-01 as per 7th CPC.
salary_details.details: Professor: Rs. 3,05,000/- per month lump sum including PF and Gratuity. Associate Professor: Rs. 2,55,000/- per month lump sum including PF and Gratuity. Assistant Professor: Rs. 1,95,000/- per month lump sum including PF and Gratuity. Medical Officers: Rs. 15600-39100+5400 (GP) (Pre-revised) and Rs. 56100/-, Level 10 and Cell-01 as per 7th CPC. For retired Government employees, remuneration shall be paid after deduction of Pension + DA from the above mentioned remuneration. No other allowances or perquisite are payable over and above the consolidated remuneration specified above.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on experience and qualifications (if large number of applications) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cnbc.delhi.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya recruitment is 27th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies announced for Teaching Faculty and Medical Officers posts in the Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post or by hand to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the highest salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The highest salary offered is for the Professor post, which is Rs. 3,05,000/- per month lump sum.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Medical Officer post is a recognized MBBS degree and completion of compulsory rotating internship.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Serviceman/DIVYANG (PH) candidates as per the Government of India's rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates from Delhi is Rs. 2000/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 1000/-, and DIVYANG candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting based on experience and qualifications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment is on a contract basis for 5 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya, which is https://cnbc.delhi.gov.in.
